subject: eastward-migrating Mediterranean cyclone
object: extension of the Sudan low-pressure zone (the Red Sea Trough)
evidence_quote: an eastward-migrating Mediterranean cyclone joined an extension of the Sudan low-pressure zone (the Red Sea Trough)
citation: de Vries et al. (2013), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: stationary anticyclone over the southeastern Arabian Peninsula (the Arabian Anticyclone)
object: clockwise flow that supplied moisture from the Arabian Sea and the Red Sea
evidence_quote: a stationary anticyclone over the southeastern Arabian Peninsula (the Arabian Anticyclone) produced a clockwise flow that supplied moisture from the Arabian Sea and the Red Sea
citation: de Vries et al. (2013), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: upper-level tropospheric instability combined with this moisture supply
object: deep moist convection
evidence_quote: upper-level tropospheric instability combined with this moisture supply to produce deep moist convection
citation: de Vries et al. (2013), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: deep moist convection
object: a quasi-stationary mesoscale convective system and heavy rainfall over Jeddah
evidence_quote: resulting in a quasi-stationary mesoscale convective system and heavy rainfall over Jeddah
citation: de Vries et al. (2013), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: The Red Sea Trough
object: low-level moisture transport and convergence
evidence_quote: The Red Sea Trough enhances low-level moisture transport and convergence
citation: de Vries et al. (2013), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: The Red Sea Trough
object: deep convection and mesoscale convective system development
evidence_quote: often acting as a precursor to deep convection and mesoscale convective system development
citation: de Vries et al. (2013), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: Surface fluxes over the Red Sea
object: low-level moist-air convergence prior to convection initiation and development
evidence_quote: Surface fluxes over the Red Sea play an important role in regulating low-level moist-air convergence prior to convection initiation and development

subject: Red Sea water
object: regional rainfall
evidence_quote: Red Sea water is estimated to affect regional rainfall by about 30 to 40 percent

subject: strong convergence areas over the Red Sea
object: uplift motion
evidence_quote: strong convergence areas form over the Red Sea that enhance uplift motion

subject: strong convergence areas over the Red Sea
object: low-level jets
evidence_quote: strengthen low-level jets

subject: strong convergence areas over the Red Sea
object: a conditionally unstable atmosphere that favours cyclonic system development
evidence_quote: create a conditionally unstable atmosphere that favours cyclonic system development

subject: stronger winds combined with drier air
object: latent heat losses of up to 410 watts per square metre
evidence_quote: stronger winds combined with drier air produce latent heat losses of up to 410 watts per square metre

subject: powerful solar radiation and persistent high-pressure systems
object: intense surface heating
evidence_quote: Saudi Arabia experiences powerful solar radiation and persistent high-pressure systems that contribute to intense surface heating

subject: subtropical high-pressure system over the Arabian Peninsula
object: extreme summer temperature variation
evidence_quote: The influence of a subtropical high-pressure system over the Arabian Peninsula is associated with extreme summer temperature variation

subject: subtropical high-pressure system, combined with the region's geographic location and solar radiation exposure
object: extreme summer heat in Saudi Arabia
evidence_quote: This subtropical high-pressure system, combined with the region's geographic location and solar radiation exposure, is identified as a primary driver of extreme summer heat in Saudi Arabia

subject: the adjacent sea
object: temperature extremes
evidence_quote: the adjacent sea moderates temperature extremes compared to the interior

subject: high pressure over eastern Africa and thermal low-pressure centres over Iran and Pakistan
object: summer Shamal
evidence_quote: The summer Shamal, occurring from May to August, is a persistent north-northwesterly wind regime driven by high pressure over eastern Africa and thermal low-pressure centres over Iran and Pakistan.
citation: Yu et al. (2016), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: steep pressure gradient between the heat low over Pakistan, Afghanistan and Iran and the high-pressure system over the eastern Mediterranean and northern Saudi Arabia
object: summer Shamal
evidence_quote: It forms due to the steep pressure gradient between the heat low over Pakistan, Afghanistan and Iran and the high-pressure system over the eastern Mediterranean and northern Saudi Arabia.
citation: Yu et al. (2016), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: summer Shamal
object: dust storm activity across the Arabian Peninsula
evidence_quote: The summer Shamal is the major driver of dust storm activity across the Arabian Peninsula
citation: Yu et al. (2016), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: summer Shamal
object: lifting dust and transporting it to the Persian Gulf and the Arabian Peninsula
evidence_quote: capable of lifting dust and transporting it to the Persian Gulf and the Arabian Peninsula
citation: Yu et al. (2016), Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres

subject: warming, drying coastal atmosphere
object: significant positive trends in surface air temperature and wind speed, alongside significant negative trends in relative humidity and sea-level pressure
evidence_quote: Data for the Saudi Arabian Red Sea coast from 1979 to 2020 show significant positive trends in surface air temperature and wind speed, alongside significant negative trends in relative humidity and sea-level pressure, consistent with a warming, drying coastal atmosphere over this period.
